subcodes.first_line: The spring of the All-Merciful hath appeared, and through it the trees have been clothed in verdure. Exalted be God Who hath manifested it in truth. Blessed is he who hath attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر ربیع الرحمن و اخضرت به الاشجار تعالی الله الذی اظهره بالحق طوبی لمن فاز
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation
